examples: The seafarer looked at him with the suspicion of a wink.
"For the crew it is," replied the seafarer gravely, again with the ghost of a wink.
Every seafarer has a right to fair terms of employment.
The strategy, execution and competition that mirrors the business world is a perfect fit for a natural seafarer.
The president traveled to Piney Point in southern Maryland where he spoke at a training school run by the Seafarer's International Union.
